name: wiki
description: Expose your SiYuan wiki as native MCP tools — search, get, journal, ADR, push.

siyuan_token.description: SiYuan API token — Settings → About → API token in SiYuan UI

siyuan_url.description: SiYuan base URL (leave blank for default: http://127.0.0.1:6806)

default_notebook.description: Default notebook name (leave blank for default: camis-wiki)
